criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test green; whole test tree collects with 0 errors

inbound_translate._normalize_adf_body STAYS importable and routes through the port; applier.py no longer imports/re-exports _ADF_KEY_APPLIER/_AdfModule_Applier/_load_adf_module; apply_inbound_records.py's three call sites behave identically (ADF dict -> text) — verified by the behavior tests plus a green import of both modules
